heading: Enforcement
label: 20105 Enforcement
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973ee–4 of Title 42
Effective DateSection applicable with respect to elections taking place after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 31, 1985section 9 of Pub. L. 98–435section 20101 of this title

children.heading: Action for declaratory or injunctive relief
children.label: a Action for declaratory or injunctive relief
children.text: If a State or political subdivision does not comply with this chapter, the United States Attorney General or a person who is personally aggrieved by the noncompliance may bring an action for declaratory or injunctive relief in the appropriate district court.

children.heading: Prerequisite notice of noncompliance
children.label: b Prerequisite notice of noncompliance
children.text: An action may be brought under this section only if the plaintiff notifies the chief election officer of the State of the noncompliance and a period of 45 days has elapsed since the date of notification.

children.heading: Attorney fees
children.label: c Attorney fees
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no award of attorney fees may be made with respect to an action under this section, except in any action brought to enforce the original judgment of the court.
